title: nf-core/its pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample_id.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

short_read1.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 1 must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

short_read2.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 2 cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'
